name: 16p12_1_recurrent_CNV
description: 16p12.1 recurrent ~520 kb microdeletion region, flanked by direct-orientation SD blocks. Acts as a susceptibility CNV for intellectual disability when combined with a second-hit CNV elsewhere (two-hit model, Girirajan 2010).

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD pair of ~50-100 kb at >98% identity; unique interval contains UQCRC2, OTOA, METTL9, EEF2K, POLR3E.
